one_liner: MrScraper is an AI-powered web scraping platform with a REST API and hosted MCP server, authenticated via API tokens, for programmatically creating and running scrapers and retrieving structured data.

auth_methods.notes: Token-based auth via 'x-api-token' HTTP header for most endpoints; analytics endpoints require the token as a query parameter 'apiTokenName' instead.

self_serve_notes: Free tier includes 100 API tokens/month, no credit card required. API token generated self-serve via user profile's API Tokens section. 10 concurrent requests allowed on free tier; no residential proxies or priority support.

api_surface.notes: REST API for creating/running scrapers (AI and standard), retrieving results, analytics endpoints, pagination, error handling. Token-scoped to V3 platform and sync endpoints; other hosts require contacting support.

evidence.supports: API token auth via x-api-token header; analytics endpoints use apiTokenName query parameter
REST API for running scrapers with parameters like scraperId, url, maxRetry, maxPages, timeout, stream
Self-serve API token generation and free tier token plan details
Programmatic scraper creation and execution via API

flags: Existing hosted MCP server already available at mcp.mrscraper.com, reducing need to build one from scratch
Free tier has limited scope (no residential proxies, 10 concurrent requests) which may affect production use cases
